message:
fix(tests): align autocomplete + compaction tests with async FileCache and context_window_tokens

Autocomplete: pre-populate file_cache.files via walk_project_files since
refresh_if_needed is now async (spawns thread). Compaction: supply explicit
context_window_tokens so test data exceeds should_compact threshold.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
